tracks.rawText: 4:05Ave Caesarv5Epic orchestral cinematic music with celestial and sacred atmosphere, Slow, powerful tempo, Deep cinematic percussion and taiko drums, massive French horns, long sustained string chords, ethereal choir singing wordless harmonies, grand pipe organ in the background, Warm golden tone, majestic and radiant, like divine light and holy fire, Subtle metallic textures and shimmering arpeggios, creating a sense of cosmic royalty and spiritual transcendence, Not aggressive, but overwhelming and luminous, Feels like walking through ancient ruins under a blazing sun, surrounded by sacred energy and starlike fire3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Ave Caesar
